hero.title: Sharp, Safe an Correct Cooking Gas Delivery For All Cameroon

how.s2Desc: Put your address and how you go pay.
how.s3Desc: Follow the rider live until e reach you.

why.f1: Cylinders wey dem check for safety

safety.title: Safety Tips
safety.t1: Always keep cylinder stand-up for place wey get air.
safety.t2: Check hose and regulator with soap water for leak.
safety.t3: Off the valve when you no dey use am, especially for night.

reviews.title: Wetin Customers Talk
reviews.r1Text: Delivery reach me before one hour. Rider dey correct.
reviews.r2Text: Better price pass all. I fit pay with MoMo.
reviews.r3Text: Easy to order for Pidgin. Sweet service!

faq.title: Questions Wey People Dey Ask
faq.q1: Which quarters for Buea una dey deliver?
faq.a1: For now we dey deliver for all these Buea quarters: Molyko, Great Soppo, Small Soppo, Bonduma, Bomaka, Bokwango, Muea, Mile 16, Check Point, Long Street, Buea Town, Government Residential Area (GRA), Clerks Quarter, Federal Quarters and Bokwai. Other quarters go soon join.
faq.a2: Pay when e reach, MTN Mobile Money an Orange Money.
faq.a3: Yes — give the rider your empty one when the fresh one come.
